nasb.text: Jahath was the first and Zizah the second; but Jeush and Beriah did not have many sons, so they became a father’s household, one class.

esv.text: Jahath was the chief, and Zizah the second; but Jeush and Beriah did not have many sons, therefore they became counted as a single father’s house.

cnv.text: 雅哈是長子，細撒是次子；耶烏施和比利亞的子孫不多，所以合為一個家族，同歸一個班次。

ccb.text: 雅哈是长子，细拿是次子。耶乌施和比利亚的子孙不多，所以合为一族。
